title: malva sylvestris subsp. vivianiana
intro: Malva sylvestris subsp. vivianiana, also known as the Mallow or Musk Mallow, is a subspecies of the Malva sylvestris plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and demulcent properties, making it effective in soothing irritated tissues and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Malva sylvestris subsp. vivianiana include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment, and can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to the affected area.
